steps.title: Use the shared shade claim
steps.content: Both texts say O'odham farmers use organ pipe cacti or similar sun-hardy species to shade tepary beans. Both also connect that shade with protection from sun and heat. Text 2's solar-panel comparison depends on that same protective-shade role.

steps.title: Reject unsupported comparisons
steps.content: Choice A invents an advantage over Salcedo's method, Choice B is only tied to Text 1's soil-moisture detail, and Choice D contradicts the shade claim. The remaining choice states what both texts support. The answer is C.
